ROOT CANAL TREATMENT 

A root canal treatment can save infected teeth. 

There are a few key signs you should be aware of to help identify symptoms that a root canal may be required:

✔️ Pain – often sharp and severe, aggravating at night, and radiating to your temples, jaw, and ears 
✔️ Swelling – pain may be accompanied by soft tissue inflammation, and at times, abscess 
✔️ Inability to chew – or eat from the affected side 
✔️ Severe sensitivity – or pain that aggravates when you eat/drink something hot, cold or sweet. 
 
Contact our friendly staff on (02) 6922 6840 if you’re experiencing any of those symptoms.
